title: Number sequence module registration (NumberSeqApplicationModule)
instruction: In the sandbox model, create an EDT DemoNoteId (String, extends Num, label @TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote). Extend the standard NumberSeqModule enum with a new value ConDemoNote (label @TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote). Create a class NumberSeqModuleDemoNote extending NumberSeqApplicationModule that overrides loadModule() to register a NumberSeqDatatype for DemoNoteId (non-continuous, manual=No, change up/down allowed, DataArea-scoped parameter type) via NumberSeqDatatype::construct() + parm*() + this.create(datatype), and overrides numberSeqModule() to return NumberSeqModule::ConDemoNote. Do NOT assign fields on a NumberSeqReference/NumberSequenceReference buffer -- those are parm*() methods on NumberSeqDatatype, not table fields, and there is no this.addModuleEntry(). Full end-to-end wiring (event handler registering the module on NumberSeqGlobal, a parameters table with a numRef method, form auto-numbering) is out of scope for this case -- it only covers the module class + its datatype registration. All 3 objects must build clean.
